reviews.comment:
Pésimo servicio. Cuando ingresaba al lugar dije "Que lindo, voy a venir más seguido" a la salida dije "No vuelvo más".
Por fuera la limpieza excelente. Por dentro un horror, había yerba debajo del asiento y no sacaron nada. Los pelos de mi perro estaban por todos lados. La guantera seguia con mugre.
No vayan acá, es para tirar la plata y el tiempo.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. When I walked in I thought, "How nice, I'll come back more often," but when I left I said, "I'm never coming back."
The exterior was spotless. The interior was awful; there was weeds under the seat and they didn't remove anything. My dog's hair was everywhere. The glove compartment was still filthy.
Don't go here; it's a waste of money and time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtb2MzT0xREAE
